bundleSize._doc: Gzip-size budget for dist/en-lightbox.js. Baseline before wave-2: 3058B gzip. Wave-2 stream-a adds the --enlb-* token surface, layout config/normalizer, responsive classes, CTA <button> change, secondary/decline CTA, and a11y/motion hardening. Measured post-build gzip: 4100B. Budget re-baselined to 4500B with headroom. Wave-2 stream-b adds theme presets (dark/brand SCSS classes), normalizeTheme, applyTheme (single root write), setTheme API, and preset token constants. Measured post-build gzip: 4573B (+473B delta from stream-a). Budget re-baselined to 5000B with headroom for wave-3. Wave-4 stream-c moves the lightbox into an open Shadow DOM (host element, attachShadow, scoped styles, :host all:initial reset, universal box-sizing, absolute object-fit:cover image box, bounded dialog max-height) for style isolation. Measured post-build gzip: 5019B (+19B delta from wave-3 ceiling). Budget re-baselined to 5200B (GATE-ARMING, Decision D13 — owner-reviewed). Old ceiling 5000B -> new ceiling 5200B; 181B headroom for the remaining wave-4/stream-b release work. Wave-5 design-refresh adds an optional eyebrow label (.enlb-eyebrow + --enlb-eyebrow :host token), two new theme presets (forest + sky SCSS classes with 9 color tokens + 3 close/focus tokens each, scoped centered content + underlined-italic secondary link), and a more-accessible close button (>=44x44 rounded backing via --enlb-close-bg/--enlb-close-color, a --enlb-focus-ring token applied to all :focus-visible rules to fix the forest white-CTA trap, and :host defaults for the new tokens). Measured post-build gzip: 5458B (+439B delta from the 5019B wave-4 baseline; the additions are inherently unique hex values + new token names that gzip cannot deduplicate). Budget re-baselined to 5600B (GATE-ARMING, Decision D13 precedent — owner-reviewed). Old ceiling 5200B -> new ceiling 5600B; 142B headroom. Wave-5 forest/sky spec correction reworks forest/sky to the client mockup (50/50 grid, campaign typography ~42px heading + ~238x56 rectangular uppercase CTA, per-theme close buttons — forest green square / sky plain black x, ~700px responsive stacking), scoped to .enlb-theme-forest/.enlb-theme-sky only (light/dark/brand unchanged). Measured post-build gzip: 5792B (+334B delta from the 5458B wave-5 ceiling; campaign layout CSS irreducible per independent review). Budget re-baselined to 6000B (GATE-ARMING, Decision D13 precedent — owner-reviewed). Old ceiling 5600B -> new ceiling 6000B; 208B headroom.
